name: Ask Concentration Z-Score (Ultra Threshold)
hypothesis: Building on the established success of `zscore(ask_depth_concentration, 300)` as a contra-signal, pushing the threshold to an extreme quantile (5.0) will isolate the most severe instances of ask-side liquidity walls. These events should have the highest probability of repelling price, leading to improved WR and expectancy for the short-sale prediction.
mutation_note: Continuing the successful 'tighten_threshold' trajectory for this signal family. Pushing from 4.5 to 5.0 to test the signal's conviction at its absolute limit.
